hypothesis: Combining Bollinger bands and ATR with RSI and STOCHASTIC indicators can detect trading opportunities in the crypto market.
Fallback contractuel: proposition générée automatiquement pour maintenir la progression quand la sortie LLM n'est pas exploitable.

The combination of EMA, OBV, STOCHASTIC indicators with ATR based risk management and specific conditions for entry (close > bollinger upper band AND RSI > 50 AND ADX >25) and exit (close crosses Bollinger middle band OR ADX < 20), reduces false signals in ranging markets while capturing significant price movements.
